title: How to combine first and last names into one cell
task: Merge separate first-name and last-name columns into a full name.
keywords: combine first and last name excel
explanation: The & operator joins text, and the " " in the middle inserts the space — giving "Ada Lovelace". It works identically in all three apps and is easier to type than CONCATENATE. To join a whole column of name parts at once, TEXTJOIN(" ",TRUE,A2:C2) also skips any empty middle-name cells automatically.
